technical_gaps.current_state: Strong local research datasets, normalization, quality checks, and reports.
technical_gaps.recommendation: Create production-grade data governance before external use.

technical_gaps.current_state: Research classifications and explainable analytics exist.
technical_gaps.recommendation: Keep signal outputs as research until independently governed.

technical_gaps.current_state: Passive local observation and replay pipelines exist.
technical_gaps.recommendation: Separate observation operations from research artifacts.

technical_gaps.current_state: Paper-only execution and portfolio governance exist.
technical_gaps.recommendation: Use paper outputs only as evidence for future design.

technical_gaps.current_state: Research and paper risk checks exist.
technical_gaps.recommendation: Design risk governance before any implementation discussion.

technical_gaps.current_state: Offline and paper simulation exist only.
technical_gaps.recommendation: Do not implement execution in the current repository.

technical_gaps.current_state: Broker-readiness research exists with forbidden live access.
technical_gaps.recommendation: Keep broker work in a separate future architecture program.
Define monitoring architecture before external systems are considered.
Create human governance before any future build plan.

technical_gaps.current_state: No compliance approval exists in the repository.
technical_gaps.recommendation: Require legal and regulatory review outside this repository.

technical_gaps.current_state: The platform is local research software.
technical_gaps.recommendation: Do not treat the research release as production software.

safety_gaps: Future risk controls are not designed for real-world operations.
Future account and credential policies are intentionally absent.
recommendations: Freeze Research Platform v1.0 before any separate program.
Open a separate architecture program only after governance approval.
